_doc: Minimal field-spec for the area-title banner renderer FUN_00494a60.

0x494a60.name: area_banner
0x494a60._note: FUN_00494a60 — area-title banner renderer, called 3x/frame from 0x48c150:176-178. ECX = banner state object (one of 3 slots). [0]=mode(1=GDI-text,2/3/4=sprite pool idx 1/0/2), [2]=alpha 0..1000, [3]=text struct ptr (+0xa=len), [5]/[6]=dst x/y, [8]=enable.
